pwa.updateDescription: A new version of the app is available. Click update to get the latest features and improvements.
pwa.installDescription: Install this application on your device for quick and easy access, even when offline.
pwa.feature1: Fast access from your desktop or home screen
pwa.iosStep2: Scroll and tap "Add to Home Screen"
pwa.iosStep3: Tap "Add" in the top right corner

appUpdate.title: New Version Available
appUpdate.forceUpdateWarning: This is a required update. Please update to continue using the app.
